ham.subject: Your XYZ Bank – Transaction Alert
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

We are writing to inform you that a transaction of $1,200.00 has been successfully processed from your account ending in 5678 on 2026-04-14 at 10:32 AM. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at 1-800-123-4567.

Thank you for banking with XYZ Bank.

Best regards,
XYZ Bank Security Team

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Notice – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent shipment with FedEx (tracking number: 123456789) was not delivered due to an unresolved issue. A missed delivery fee of $45.00 will be applied unless you confirm the delivery address or provide additional authorization.

Please click the link below to review your shipment details and avoid any further charges:

<URL>

If you do not act within 48 hours, the fee will be automatically imposed and your account will be suspended.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Support
